purpose: Smoke-test the MoDA -> mteb encoder adapter end-to-end on two small public retrieval tasks before committing to the full ~130-task MIEB run.
interpretation: Harness validated end-to-end: encode_image / encode_text / similarity protocols all work with mteb 2.12.25.
MoDA checkpoint loading via open_clip + load_state_dict(strict=False) works on the SigLIP CustomTextCLIP architecture.
On out-of-domain landmark photos (GLDv2), MoDA-Distilled is statistically tied with FashionSigLIP base (+0.19 pp nDCG@10).
On generic-caption T2I (Flickr30k), MoDA-Distilled regresses 2.97 pp vs FashionSigLIP base, expected because the distillation target ensemble was fashion-only.
Submission-ready JSON files written under results/mieb/<model>/<lazzyPie__name>/v1/<TaskName>.json — same format as the mteb-results repo expects.
next_steps: P0: Submit smoke-test JSONs as a draft PR to embeddings-benchmark/results to verify schema acceptance.
P1: Run on fashion-relevant MIEB tasks (Fashion200kT2I, Fashion200kI2T, FashionIQ-IT2I) where MoDA should outperform.
P1: Run the MIEB low-resource subset (smallest ~30 tasks) for an honest baseline ranking.
P2: Full MIEB (~130 tasks) — only after fashion-specific wins are confirmed; ~A100-day of compute.
